---
name: Feature request
about: Something that isn't there yet
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the concrete situation you're in. Not "wouldn't it be nice
if..." but "when I try to X, Y happens, but I want Z."

## Proposed solution

Your best guess at the shape of the fix. Doesn't have to be a full
design.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help — reference papers, similar tools
that got this right, screenshots, etc.
